Compliance.description: ICASA licensed; Vodacom spectrum partnership; recent regulatory approval for mobile; standard compliance.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 2.12/5; mixed; app 3.5/5; billing complaints common but 5G home praised.

Product Value.description: Best value 5G home broadband in SA; unlimited data proposition; competitive vs Telkom/ISPs.

Innovation.description: 5G-first network; unlimited home broadband; data-only; MVNO for mobile; innovative pricing model.

Customer Support.description: Online chat, email, support app; weak call centre; complaints of poor resolution.

Accessibility & Security.description: Online-first; limited physical presence; standard security; POPIA compliance assumed.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: 5G Home from R479/mo unlimited; Mobile from R69/mo

socialSentiment.summary: 5G home product praised; billing/support complaints common on social.
